1705890.name: ZodiacChild
1705890.description:
Are you clever enough to catch the Zodiac? Find out in this beautiful hand-drawn 2D puzzle platformer.

Figure out how to catch the zodiac animals while navigating the world in which they reside. Start with the slowest animal first, and be rewarded with memories and abilities. Enjoy fun individual levels while uncovering the darker over-arching story and our child's true purpose.

Features:

  • Enjoy a stylized hand-drawn world filled with magic
  • Be rewarded with new skills and abilities
  • Discover the deeper post-apocalyptic story and uncover your missing memories
  • Run alongside cute animals!
  • Support a one-woman Indie studio!
1705890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
